name: JEE Main
eligibility: Class 12 passed with Physics, Chemistry and Math (PCM).
syllabus: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics — based on NCERT Class 11 & 12.

name: JEE Advanced
pattern: Two papers (3 hours each), MCQ + numerical answer type.

name: BITSAT
eligibility: Class 12 with PCM and minimum 75% marks.
syllabus: Physics, Chemistry, Math, English Proficiency, Logical Reasoning.
pattern: Online test of 130 questions in 3 hours.

name: NEET UG
eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English.
pattern: Pen-and-paper test, 200 questions (180 to attempt), 720 marks, 3 hr 20 min.

name: GATE
eligibility: Bachelor's degree in Engineering / Technology / Science.
syllabus: Engineering subjects, mathematics and general aptitude.

name: CA Foundation
syllabus: Accounting, Business Laws, Quantitative Aptitude, Business Economics.
pattern: Four papers, 100 marks each (mix of subjective and objective).

name: CLAT
eligibility: Class 12 passed with at least 45% marks.
syllabus: English, Current Affairs, Legal Reasoning, Logical Reasoning, Quantitative Techniques.

name: CTET
eligibility: Graduation + B.Ed or equivalent teacher training.
syllabus: Child Development & Pedagogy, Language, Math, EVS / Social Studies.
pattern: Two papers (Paper I for Class 1–5, Paper II for Class 6–8).

name: NATA
syllabus: Visual perception, drawing, architectural awareness, math, reasoning.

name: NMAT
syllabus: Language Skills, Quantitative Skills, Logical Reasoning.

name: UCEED
fullName: Undergraduate Common Entrance Exam for Design
syllabus: Visualization, observation, design sensibility, environmental awareness.
pattern: Computer-based test, 3 hours, MCQ + numerical + sketching.

name: NID DAT
syllabus: Visual perception, creative thinking, drawing, general awareness.
